items.title: Independent report: SME Digital Adoption Taskforce: 2026 update
items.summary: An update on digital adoption work relating to the taskforce and its 10 recommendations to help small businesses adopt digital technologies.

items.title: Research: Ambient gamma radiation dose rates across the UK
items.summary: Data received from fixed and mobile monitors measuring the ambient (background) gamma radiation dose rate across the UK.

items.title: Sunderland Business Support Fund
items.summary: Grants are available to support projects costing between £3,000 and £6,000 (excluding VAT). The Business Support Fund can cover up to 40% of eligible business spend.

items.title: Guidance: UK ETS: Waste quarterly data report template (Q2)
items.summary: Template for use by waste operators to submit waste quarterly data reports to their regulator during the voluntary monitoring, reporting and verification period.

items.title: UK launches first ever taskforce to strengthen climate security
items.summary: Leading security, military and academics have joined forces with the government to boost the UK’s preparedness for the security impacts of climate change.

items.title: Equity and Loan fund in Greater Manchester
items.summary: £10m investment fund to support the growth of companies in the advanced manufacturing and materials sector in Greater Manchester.

items.title: Policy paper: CPTPP: joint ministerial statement on energy security and supply chains for essential energy products and other impacted products
items.summary: At the 26 June 2026 ministerial commission meeting, ministers issued a joint statement on disruptions to global energy supply chains caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Policy paper: CPTPP: joint ministerial statement from the 10th commission meeting, 26 June 2026
items.summary: A jointly prepared statement following the virtual ministerial commission meeting of Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) members.

items.title: Thousands of homes will be eligible for £9,000 off a heat pump
items.summary: Households on heating oil across England and Wales will be eligible for £9,000 off a heat pump, helping them cut bills.

items.title: Statutory guidance: Capacity Market Rules
items.summary: The Capacity Market Rules provide the detail for implementing the operating framework set out in regulations.

items.title: Delivering the homes that Britain deserves
items.summary: Speech by Minister for Energy Consumers, Martin McCluskey, at the Housing 2026 conference.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Building materials and components statistics: June 2026
items.summary: Provides information on selected building materials and contains monthly data on price indices, bricks, cement and concrete blocks; and quarterly data on sand and gravel, slate, concrete roofing tiles and ready-mixed concrete.

items.title: Policy paper: Australia-Canada-UK energy and climate cooperation: joint statement
items.summary: A joint statement from Australia, Canada and the UK on energy and climate cooperation.

items.title: Decision: UK-Faroe Islands free trade agreement documents
items.summary: Decisions, documents and meeting minutes from the UK-Faroe Islands free trade agreement.

items.title: Guidance: DBT worldwide offices
items.summary: Contact details for Department for Business and Trade (DBT) offices around the world and a list of our HM Trade Commissioners.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: workforce management information May 2026
items.summary: Reports on departmental staff numbers and costs.

items.summary: A register of the private interests declared by DESNZ board members.

items.summary: Data on gifts and hospitality received by special advisers, and meetings they attended with senior media figures.

items.summary: Data on senior officials’ (SCS2+) business expenses, hospitality, and meetings with external individuals and organisations.

items.title: Liverpool City Region Flexible Growth Fund
items.summary: Providing fee free, Interest subsidised loans up to £1m, this fund can provide up to 50% of eligible capital expenditure repayable over a maximum 5 year term.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Household Energy Efficiency Statistics, headline release June 2026
items.summary: Household Energy Efficiency Statistics, headline release (June 2026).

items.title: Research: Industry energy needs: refresh of modelling assumptions
items.summary: A refresh of industry technology modelling assumptions used in COMIT, including decarbonisation technology and baseline technology costs.

items.title: Cost Optimisation Model for Industrial Technologies (COMIT)
items.summary: COMIT is a computer program that allows user to find the least cost pathway for meeting the energy needs of UK industry from now until 2050.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy trends and prices: April - June 2026
items.summary: Monthly production, trade, electricity generation and consumption of coal, electricity, gas, oil and total energy; retail price and EU comparative price data, and petrol & diesel price data.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Solar PV deployment: May 2026
items.summary: Monthly deployment of solar photovoltaic capacity in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Notice: Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition: round 2
items.summary: This competition provides grant funding for investments in the manufacture of heat pumps and strategically important heat pump components in the UK.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy trends: January to March 2027
items.summary: Energy production, consumption and trade of total energy, coal, oil, gas, electricity and renewables during the first calendar quarter of 2027.

items.title: Transparency data: DBT: spending over £25,000, April 2026
items.summary: Reports on departmental spending over £25,000.

items.title: Decision: UK's steel trade measure from 1 July 2026
items.summary: Details about a new steel trade measure from 1 July 2026, which will limit tariff-free steel import quota volumes.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/14: announcing the Dual-Use OGEL
items.summary: The Dual-Use Open General Export Licence (OGEL) covers an extensive list of dual-use items for a wider list of destinations, including South Korea, Chile, Singapore and Uruguay.

items.title: Guidance: Open general export licence (export of dual-use items)
items.summary: Licence permitting a wide range of dual-use listed items to a variety of destinations, including EU member states, the United States, and others.

items.title: Guidance: Overseas business risk for Malaysia
items.summary: Information on key security and political risks which UK businesses may face when operating in Malaysia.

items.title: How to make a data protection complaint to the Department for Business and Trade
items.summary: We are committed to handling your personal data in a way that is fair, transparent and in accordance with the law. If you are dissatisfied with how we have handled your data, this process outlines how you can make a complaint.

items.title: Wales’s foreign investment win boosts economy and jobs market
items.summary: Statistics released today (23 June) show that Wales continues to successfully attract foreign investors.

items.title: Transparency data: Post Office Horizon financial redress and legal costs data for 2026
items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.
